epigraph.quote: The boys lit a fire to toast marshmallows in the evening but the wind was too cold to sit out.

per_stop.quote: We heard the choir in the Priory. William ushered. Peter sang.
Simon + the boys have played cricket + discussed William's Psion + Simon's Palm Top T.
He left his knapsack on the train & had to spend the night with Lizzie.
We collected circular slate from the slate factory at Port Maddock
